div.p: Comparing two approaches to sum 4 floats in an XMM register

hadd_ps is optimized for code size, not performance. The shuffle+add pattern exploits Instruction-Level Parallelism (ILP) by distributing uops across multiple execution ports (P0/P1 for adds, P5 for shuffles).

g.text: Execution Ports | P5 only | P0, P1, P5
